experience.title: Core Service Developer
highlights: Designed and deployed production REST APIs supporting loan servicing, payments, compliance, and litigation workflows in a regulated fintech environment.
Delivered a backend feature generating USD 30K in revenue while reducing downstream legal risk for clients.

Developed Salesforce-integrated APIs enabling real-time synchronization of customer payment data and account updates across systems.
Resolved complex edge-case defects identified in QA and production, improving system stability and reducing recurring failures.
Worked across backend services, database logic, QA workflows, and product requirements to deliver reliable features in sprint-based development.

experience.title: Financial Advisor
